videos.title: Long Distance Fail - Finnspring 2012 DNF
videos.description: Not good! The terrain was very tough, and still a lot of snow that was pretty deep in places. Everywhere else was muddy or green as hell. Lost all motivation on the way to the first control when I was already totally exhausted - lost my place on the map and started running blindly, until I found something recognizable, but nothing seemed to make sense. Lost about 4min. Got caught up 6min by Dmitry Tsvetkov at the 3rd control and FAILED to follow him - he totally put me down about 1min. I did a few more controls for training and then packed it in. Time for Ross to do some training...

videos.title: KOHTI VUOKATTI HIIHTOA, 1. osa: Sulanmaan harjoitttelu
videos.description:
Kohti Vuokatti Hiihtoa -videosarjassa Olli Ohtonen* antaa vinkkejä hiihtokauden eri vaiheiden harjoitteluun matkalla kohti Vuokatti Hiihtoa. Ensimmäisessä osassa pureudutaan sulanmaan harjoitteluun sauvarinteen muodossa.

*Vuokatti Hiihdon hovivalmentaja Olli Ohtonen on Suomen sprinttimaajoukkueen sekä Iivo Niskasen henkilökohtainen valmentaja

videos.title: Vuokatti Trail Challenge 2015 trailer
videos.description:
Vuokatti Trail Challenge 27.6.2015

Trail running -tapahtuma läpi erämaiden Pohjois-Karjalan Valtimolta Kainuun Vuokattiin. Korpea, rämettä, upeita harjuja, jylhiä vaaranrinteitä ja maalissa vain voittajia. Tervetuloa!

- The Ultimate Trail Running Experience in the Wilderness of Kainuu and North Karelia -

videos.title: 2013-05-19, Finnish ultra long champs, part 1
videos.description:
Not complete!

This is only the first map (out of four) of the ultra long distance competition at Tikirasinmäki, Puumala. My external battery of the camera ran out after three hours. I might upload rest of my material later.

Music by EvsY used without permission.

videos.title: Mixed Relay competition - 1st World Ski Orienteering University Championship 2016 in Tula - Russia
videos.description:
Tula 2016 12/02/ -1st World Ski Orienteering University Championshipmen's WUC 2016.
Mixed Relay Race result:
Norway win gold, silver for Finland and Russia bronze.
